# DeclarativeManagementResponse

**Device Management Command**

A response from the device after it processes the command to enable your server to support declarative management or trigger a declarative management synchronization operation on the device.

## Declaration

```swift
object DeclarativeManagementResponse
```

## Objects

- **DeclarativeManagementResponse.ErrorChainItem**: A dictionary that describes an error chain item.

## Commands and responses

- **DeclarativeManagementCommand**: The command to enable your server to support declarative management or trigger a declarative management synchronization operation on the device.
